title: United States Application for Naturalization (Form N-400)
description: Apply for U.S. citizenship through naturalization using Form N-400 (Application for Naturalization): eligibility, biographic and residence history, marital and family history, employment and travel history, the extensive background/good-moral-character disclosure questions, an optional fee reduction request, and applicant/interpreter/preparer certification and signature. It does not submit the application; the live U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) source is always authoritative (see verification). Filing is available online via a login-gated myUSCIS account or by mail; this schema is sourced from the official Form N-400 AcroForm and Instructions, since the interactive online flow requires an authenticated account and could not be inspected directly.

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed from the live Form N-400 PDF and Instructions at uscis.gov (Edition 01/20/25, fetched directly, no access block). Online filing via myUSCIS requires an authenticated account and could not be inspected, so per the issue's fallback guidance this schema is sourced from the official AcroForm instead. All 14 pages were extracted via pdfjs-dist text and position (x/y) extraction and transcribed field-by-field; ambiguous or densely-packed sections (Part 1 eligibility category lettering, Part 3 biographic item numbering) were cross-checked with position-sorted text to resolve PDF content-stream ordering that did not match visual reading order. The repeating-table row counts (previous physical addresses x3, employment/school entries x3, trips outside the U.S. x6, children x3, Part 9 crime/offense disclosure rows x5) were confirmed by rendering the corresponding pages to PNG via pdfjs-dist+node-canvas and visually counting table rows/columns, then cross-checked against the PDF's AcroForm field names. The GovSchema field model has no repeating-group/array type, so each table is modeled as N fixed, numbered field sets (e.g. previousAddress1..3, trip1..6) matching the source form's actual row count rather than an arbitrary truncation. Status remains 'draft' given the scale of this form (268 fields): recommend a second-reviewer pass focused on Part 9 (Additional Information About You, the good-moral-character background section, items 1-37) before promoting to 'verified'.

fields.name: eligibilityCategory
fields.label: Reason for Filing
fields.description: Select only one box to identify the basis of eligibility. General provision (a) requires 5 years as an LPR (3 for spouse-of-USC filers under a different reason); each option routes to different eligibility requirements documented in the Form N-400 Instructions.

fields.name: otherReasonExplanation
fields.label: If "Other Reason for Filing," explain
fields.description: Required when eligibilityCategory is "other".

fields.name: alienRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Alien Registration Number (A-Number)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Digits only (the form prefixes a printed "A-").

fields.name: uscisFieldOfficeOverseas
fields.label: USCIS field office for naturalization interview (residing outside the United States)
fields.description: Required when the applicant's residential address is outside the United States and filing under INA section 319(b), which applies to eligibilityCategory "spouse_of_us_citizen_qualified_employment_abroad". Select from the list at uscis.gov/field-offices.

fields.name: currentFamilyName
fields.label: Your Current Legal Name — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Do not provide a nickname.

fields.name: currentGivenName
fields.label: Your Current Legal Name — given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: currentMiddleName
fields.label: Your Current Legal Name — middle name (if applicable)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: otherNameFamilyName
fields.label: Other Name You Have Used Since Birth — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The form provides a single-entry row on the printed page; use Part 14. Additional Information for further prior names.

fields.name: otherNameGivenName
fields.label: Other Name You Have Used Since Birth — given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: otherNameMiddleName
fields.label: Other Name You Have Used Since Birth — middle name (if applicable)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: wantsNameChange
fields.label: Would you like to legally change your name?
fields.description: If true, give the new name in newFamilyName/newGivenName/newMiddleName. Optional — a naturalization court name change is not required.

fields.name: newFamilyName
fields.label: New legal name — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when wantsNameChange is true.

fields.name: newGivenName
fields.label: New legal name — given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when wantsNameChange is true.

fields.name: newMiddleName
fields.label: New legal name — middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: uscisOnlineAccountNumber
fields.label: USCIS Online Account Number (if any)

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: dateBecamePermanentResident
fields.label: Date you became a lawful permanent resident
fields.description: Required if the applicant is a lawful permanent resident (the ordinary path to naturalization); some military-service-based filers under eligibilityCategory "military_service_during_hostilities" or "one_year_honorable_military_service" may not yet hold LPR status.

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of Birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: countryOfCitizenshipOrNationality
fields.label: Country of Citizenship or Nationality
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If a citizen or national of more than one country, list additional countries in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: parentWasUSCitizenBefore18
fields.label: Was your mother or father (including adoptive parent) a U.S. citizen before your 18th birthday?
fields.description: If true, the applicant may already be a U.S. citizen and should not complete Form N-400; see Form N-600 instead.

fields.name: hasDisabilityAffectingTesting
fields.label: Do you have a physical or developmental disability or mental impairment that prevents you from demonstrating your knowledge and understanding of the English language or civics requirements for naturalization?
fields.description: If true, a completed Form N-648, Medical Certification for Disability Exceptions, must be submitted with the application.

fields.name: wantsSSACard
fields.label: Do you want the Social Security Administration to issue you an original or replacement Social Security card and update your immigration status with the SSA when you are naturalized?
fields.description: If true, give socialSecurityNumber and consentDisclosureToSSA (which must then also be true).

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Social Security Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when wantsSSACard is true.

fields.name: consentDisclosureToSSA
fields.label: Consent for Disclosure: I authorize disclosure of information from this application and USCIS systems to the SSA
fields.description: Required (and must be true) when wantsSSACard is true.

fields.name: ethnicity
fields.label: Ethnicity (select only one box)
fields.description: Required for background checks.

fields.name: race
fields.label: Race (select all applicable boxes)
fields.description: Required for background checks. Modeled as a comma-separated list of: american_indian_or_alaska_native, asian, black_or_african_american, native_hawaiian_or_other_pacific_islander, white.

fields.name: heightFeet
fields.label: Height — feet

fields.name: heightInches
fields.label: Height — inches

fields.name: weightPounds
fields.label: Weight — pounds

fields.name: eyeColor
fields.label: Eye color (select only one box)

fields.name: hairColor
fields.label: Hair color (select only one box)

fields.name: previousAddress3City

fields.name: isMailingSameAsPhysical
fields.label: Is your current physical address also your current mailing address?
fields.description: If true, skip the mailingAddress* fields (Part 5 follows directly).

fields.name: mailingAddressInCareOfName
fields.label: Current Mailing Address — in care of name (if any)
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Current Mailing Address — street number and name
fields.description: Required when isMailingSameAsPhysical is false.

fields.name: mailingAddressAptSteFlr
fields.label: Current Mailing Address — apartment/suite/floor number

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Current Mailing Address — city or town
fields.description: Required when isMailingSameAsPhysical is false.

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Current Mailing Address — state
fields.description: For a U.S. address.

fields.name: mailingAddressZipCode
fields.label: Current Mailing Address — ZIP code
fields.description: For a U.S. address.

fields.name: mailingAddressProvince

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode

fields.description: For a foreign address.

fields.name: mailingAddressCountry

fields.description: Required when isMailingSameAsPhysical is false.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: What is your current marital status?
fields.description: If "single_never_married", skip the remaining Part 5 fields (go to Part 6).

fields.name: spouseCurrentlyInArmedForces
fields.label: If you are currently married, is your spouse a current member of the U.S. armed forces?
fields.description: Applicable when maritalStatus is not "single_never_married".

fields.name: timesMarried
fields.label: How many times have you been married?
fields.description: Applicable when maritalStatus is not "single_never_married".

fields.name: currentSpouseFamilyName
fields.label: Current Spouse's Legal Name — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when filing under eligibilityCategory "spouse_of_us_citizen" or "spouse_of_us_citizen_qualified_employment_abroad".

fields.name: currentSpouseGivenName

fields.name: currentSpouseAddressSameAsApplicant

fields.name: currentSpouseBecameCitizenBy

fields.description: Required when currentSpouseBecameCitizenBy is "other".

fields.name: currentSpouseTimesMarried
fields.label: How many times has your current spouse been married?

fields.name: currentSpouseCurrentEmployer
fields.label: Current Spouse's Current Employer or Company
fields.description: Only applicable when filing under eligibilityCategory "spouse_of_us_citizen_qualified_employment_abroad".

fields.name: totalChildrenUnder18
fields.label: Indicate your total number of children under 18 years of age

fields.name: child1Name
fields.label: Child 1 — son or daughter's name (first name and family name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The source form provides 3 rows; if you have more than three children, use Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: child1DateOfBirth
fields.label: Child 1 — date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: child1Relationship

fields.name: child1Residence

fields.description: If the child does not reside with the applicant, provide the address in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: child1ProvidingSupport

fields.description: Only asked when filing under eligibilityCategory "spouse_of_us_citizen_qualified_employment_abroad" (Part 6, Item 8 preamble).

fields.name: claimedUSCitizenship
fields.label: Have you EVER claimed to be a U.S. citizen (in writing or any other way)?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: votedInUSElection
fields.label: Have you EVER registered to vote or voted in any Federal, state, or local election in the United States?
fields.description: May be answered "No" if the applicant lawfully voted only in a local election where non-citizens are eligible to vote.

fields.name: owesOverdueTaxes
fields.label: Do you currently owe any overdue Federal, state, or local taxes in the United States?

fields.name: calledSelfNonresidentAlienOnTaxReturn
fields.label: Since becoming a lawful permanent resident, have you called yourself a "nonresident alien" on a Federal, state, or local tax return, or decided not to file a tax return because you considered yourself a nonresident?

fields.name: memberOfCommunistOrTotalitarianParty
fields.label: Have you EVER been a member of, involved in, or in any way associated with any Communist or totalitarian party, anywhere in the world?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: advocatedOverthrowOrTotalitarianism
fields.label: Have you EVER advocated (supported or promoted), or been a member of, involved in, or associated with, any group anywhere in the world that advocated: the overthrow of the U.S. Government by force or other unconstitutional means; opposition to all organized government; world communism; establishment of a totalitarian dictatorship in the United States; the unlawful assaulting or killing of any government officer; unlawful damage, injury, or destruction of property; or sabotage?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: usedWeaponOrExplosiveToHarm
fields.label: Have you EVER used a weapon or explosive with intent to harm another person or cause damage to property?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: engagedInKidnappingAssassinationHijacking
fields.label: Have you EVER engaged (participated) in kidnapping, assassination, or hijacking or sabotage of an airplane, ship, vehicle, or other mode of transportation?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: threatenedOrConspiredWeaponOrHijackingActs
fields.label: Have you EVER threatened, attempted, conspired, prepared, planned, advocated for, or incited others to commit any of the acts described in Item Numbers 6.a. or 6.b.?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: orderedIncitedCommittedTorture
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in torture?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: orderedIncitedCommittedGenocide
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in genocide?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: orderedIncitedCommittedKillingOrAttempt
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in killing or trying to kill any person?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: orderedIncitedSevereInjury
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in intentionally and severely injuring or trying to injure any person?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: orderedIncitedNonconsensualSexualContact
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in any kind of sexual contact or activity with any person who did not consent or was unable to consent?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: orderedIncitedPreventingReligiousPractice
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in not letting someone practice his or her religion?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: orderedIncitedHarmDueToProtectedGround
fields.label: Have you EVER ordered, incited, called for, committed, assisted, helped with, or otherwise participated in causing harm or suffering to any person because of race, religion, national origin, membership in a particular social group, or political opinion?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: servedInMilitaryOrPoliceUnit
fields.label: Have you EVER served in, been a member of, assisted, or participated in any military or police unit?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information. If "Yes" to Item 8.a or 8.b, include country, unit name, rank/position, and dates of involvement in the Part 14 explanation.

fields.name: servedInArmedGroup
fields.label: Have you EVER served in, been a member of, assisted, or participated in any armed group (for example a paramilitary unit, self-defense unit, vigilante unit, rebel group, or guerrilla group)?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: workedInDetentionFacility
fields.label: Have you EVER worked, volunteered, or otherwise served in a place where people were detained (for example a prison, jail, prison camp, detention facility, or labor camp), or directed or participated in any other activity that involved detaining people?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: partOfGroupUsingOrThreateningWeapon
fields.label: Were you EVER a part of, or did you EVER help, any group, unit, or organization that used a weapon against any person, or threatened to do so?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: usedWeaponAgainstPersonInGroup
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 10.a., when you were part of or helped that group, did you EVER use a weapon against another person?

fields.name: threatenedWeaponAgainstPersonInGroup
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 10.a., when you were part of or helped that group, did you EVER threaten to use a weapon against another person?

fields.name: receivedWeaponsOrMilitaryTraining
fields.label: Have you EVER received any weapons training, paramilitary training, or other military-type training?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: soldOrTransportedWeaponsKnowinglyForHarm
fields.label: Have you EVER sold, provided, or transported weapons, or assisted any person in selling, providing, or transporting weapons, which you knew or believed would be used against another person?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: recruitedChildSoldiers
fields.label: Have you EVER recruited, enlisted, conscripted, or used any person under 15 years of age to serve in or help an armed group, or attempted or worked with others to do so?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: usedChildInHostilities
fields.label: Have you EVER used any person under 15 years of age to take part in hostilities, or attempted or worked with others to do so?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: committedUnarrestedCrime
fields.label: Have you EVER committed, agreed to commit, asked someone else to commit, helped commit, or tried to commit a crime or offense for which you were NOT arrested?
fields.description: Includes crimes and offenses anywhere in the world, including domestic violence and driving under the influence, even while under 18 years of age.

fields.name: everArrestedCitedDetainedOrCharged
fields.label: Have you EVER been arrested, cited, detained, or confined by any law enforcement officer, military official, or immigration official for any reason, or been charged with a crime or offense?
fields.description: If "Yes," complete the crime/offense table (crime1..crime5) even if records were sealed, expunged, or otherwise cleared.

fields.name: crime1DateOfCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 1 — date of the crime or offense
fields.description: The source form provides a 5-row table for disclosing every qualifying crime or offense (Part 9, Item 15).

fields.name: crime1Place
fields.label: Crime or Offense 1 — place (city or town, state, country)

fields.name: crime1WhatWasCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 1 — what was the crime or offense
fields.description: If convicted, provide the crime of conviction; if not convicted, the crime or offense listed in the arrest, citation, or charging document.

fields.name: crime1Disposition
fields.label: Crime or Offense 1 — result or disposition
fields.description: For example: no charges filed, convicted, charges dismissed, detention, jail, probation.

fields.name: crime1DateOfConviction
fields.label: Crime or Offense 1 — date of conviction or guilty plea (if applicable)

fields.name: crime1Sentence
fields.label: Crime or Offense 1 — sentence (if applicable)
fields.description: For example: 90 days in jail, 90 days on probation.

fields.name: crime2DateOfCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 2 — date of the crime or offense

fields.name: crime2Place
fields.label: Crime or Offense 2 — place (city or town, state, country)

fields.name: crime2WhatWasCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 2 — what was the crime or offense
fields.description: If convicted, provide the crime of conviction; if not convicted, the crime or offense listed in the arrest, citation, or charging document.

fields.name: crime2Disposition
fields.label: Crime or Offense 2 — result or disposition
fields.description: For example: no charges filed, convicted, charges dismissed, detention, jail, probation.

fields.name: crime2DateOfConviction
fields.label: Crime or Offense 2 — date of conviction or guilty plea (if applicable)

fields.name: crime2Sentence
fields.label: Crime or Offense 2 — sentence (if applicable)
fields.description: For example: 90 days in jail, 90 days on probation.

fields.name: crime3DateOfCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 3 — date of the crime or offense

fields.name: crime3Place
fields.label: Crime or Offense 3 — place (city or town, state, country)

fields.name: crime3WhatWasCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 3 — what was the crime or offense
fields.description: If convicted, provide the crime of conviction; if not convicted, the crime or offense listed in the arrest, citation, or charging document.

fields.name: crime3Disposition
fields.label: Crime or Offense 3 — result or disposition
fields.description: For example: no charges filed, convicted, charges dismissed, detention, jail, probation.

fields.name: crime3DateOfConviction
fields.label: Crime or Offense 3 — date of conviction or guilty plea (if applicable)

fields.name: crime3Sentence
fields.label: Crime or Offense 3 — sentence (if applicable)
fields.description: For example: 90 days in jail, 90 days on probation.

fields.name: crime4DateOfCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 4 — date of the crime or offense

fields.name: crime4Place
fields.label: Crime or Offense 4 — place (city or town, state, country)

fields.name: crime4WhatWasCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 4 — what was the crime or offense
fields.description: If convicted, provide the crime of conviction; if not convicted, the crime or offense listed in the arrest, citation, or charging document.

fields.name: crime4Disposition
fields.label: Crime or Offense 4 — result or disposition
fields.description: For example: no charges filed, convicted, charges dismissed, detention, jail, probation.

fields.name: crime4DateOfConviction
fields.label: Crime or Offense 4 — date of conviction or guilty plea (if applicable)

fields.name: crime4Sentence
fields.label: Crime or Offense 4 — sentence (if applicable)
fields.description: For example: 90 days in jail, 90 days on probation.

fields.name: crime5DateOfCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 5 — date of the crime or offense

fields.name: crime5Place
fields.label: Crime or Offense 5 — place (city or town, state, country)

fields.name: crime5WhatWasCrime
fields.label: Crime or Offense 5 — what was the crime or offense
fields.description: If convicted, provide the crime of conviction; if not convicted, the crime or offense listed in the arrest, citation, or charging document.

fields.name: crime5Disposition
fields.label: Crime or Offense 5 — result or disposition
fields.description: For example: no charges filed, convicted, charges dismissed, detention, jail, probation.

fields.name: crime5DateOfConviction
fields.label: Crime or Offense 5 — date of conviction or guilty plea (if applicable)

fields.name: crime5Sentence
fields.label: Crime or Offense 5 — sentence (if applicable)
fields.description: For example: 90 days in jail, 90 days on probation.

fields.name: completedSuspendedSentenceProbationOrParole
fields.label: If you received a suspended sentence, were placed on probation, or were paroled, have you completed it?

fields.name: engagedInProstitution
fields.label: Have you EVER engaged in prostitution, attempted to procure or import prostitutes or persons for the purpose of prostitution, or received any proceeds or money from prostitution?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: traffickedControlledSubstances
fields.label: Have you EVER manufactured, cultivated, produced, distributed, dispensed, sold, or smuggled (trafficked) any controlled substances, illegal drugs, narcotics, or drug paraphernalia in violation of any law?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: marriedForImmigrationBenefit
fields.label: Have you EVER married someone in order to obtain an immigration benefit?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: marriedMultiplePeopleSimultaneously
fields.label: Have you EVER been married to more than one person at the same time?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: helpedOthersEnterUSIllegally
fields.label: Have you EVER helped anyone to enter, or try to enter, the United States illegally?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: gambledIllegally
fields.label: Have you EVER gambled illegally or received income from illegal gambling?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: failedToSupportDependents
fields.label: Have you EVER failed to support your dependents (pay child support) or to pay alimony?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: misrepresentedForPublicBenefit
fields.label: Have you EVER made any misrepresentation to obtain any public benefit in the United States?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: gaveFalseInfoToUSOfficials
fields.label: Have you EVER given any U.S. Government officials any information or documentation that was false, fraudulent, or misleading?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: liedToGainEntryOrBenefits
fields.label: Have you EVER lied to any U.S. Government officials to gain entry or admission into the United States, or to gain immigration benefits while in the United States?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: removedOrDeportedFromUS
fields.label: Have you EVER been removed or deported from the United States?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: placedInRemovalProceedings
fields.label: Have you EVER been placed in removal, rescission, or deportation proceedings?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: isMaleResidedInUSBetween18And26
fields.label: Are you a male who lived in the United States at any time between your 18th and 26th birthdays?
fields.description: Do not select "Yes" if the applicant was a lawful nonimmigrant for all of that time period. Federal law requires nearly all people born male who are U.S. citizens or immigrants, ages 18 through 25, to register with Selective Service (www.sss.gov).

fields.name: registeredForSelectiveService
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 22.a., did you register for the Selective Service?

fields.name: selectiveServiceNumber
fields.label: Selective Service Number
fields.description: Required when registeredForSelectiveService is true.

fields.name: selectiveServiceRegistrationDate
fields.label: Date Registered for Selective Service
fields.description: Required when registeredForSelectiveService is true.

fields.name: leftUSToAvoidDraft
fields.label: Have you EVER left the United States to avoid being drafted in the U.S. armed forces?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: appliedForMilitaryServiceExemption
fields.label: Have you EVER applied for any kind of exemption from military service in the U.S. armed forces?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: servedInUSArmedForces
fields.label: Have you EVER served in the U.S. armed forces?
fields.description: If "No," skip to Item Number 30.a.

fields.name: currentlyMemberOfUSArmedForces
fields.label: Are you currently a member of the U.S. armed forces?

fields.name: scheduledToDeployOutsideUS
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 26.a., are you scheduled to deploy outside the United States (including to a vessel) within the next 3 months?

fields.name: currentlyStationedOutsideUS
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 26.a., are you currently stationed outside the United States?

fields.name: formerServiceMemberResidingOutsideUS
fields.label: If you answered "No" to Item Number 26.a., are you a former U.S. military service member currently residing outside the United States?

fields.name: dischargedFromArmedForcesBecauseAlien
fields.label: Have you EVER been discharged from training or service in the U.S. armed forces because you were an alien?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: courtMartialedOrDishonorableDischarge
fields.label: Have you EVER been court-martialed, or received a discharge characterized as other than honorable, bad conduct, or dishonorable, while in the U.S. armed forces?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: desertedFromArmedForces
fields.label: Have you EVER deserted from the U.S. armed forces?
fields.description: When a question includes the word "EVER," it covers any actions or conduct anywhere in the world at any time, unless otherwise specified. A "Yes" answer requires an explanation in Part 14. Additional Information.

fields.name: hasHereditaryTitleOrNobility
fields.label: Do you now have, or did you EVER have, a hereditary title or an order of nobility in any foreign country?
fields.description: If "No," skip to Item Number 31.

fields.name: willingToGiveUpTitleOfNobility
fields.label: If you answered "Yes" to Item Number 30.a., are you willing to give up any inherited titles or orders of nobility that you have in a foreign country at your naturalization ceremony?

fields.name: supportsConstitutionAndGovernment
fields.label: Do you support the Constitution and form of Government of the United States?

fields.name: willingToBearArms
fields.label: If the law requires it, are you willing to bear arms on behalf of the United States?

fields.name: unableToTakeOathDueToDisability
fields.label: Are you unable to take the Oath of Allegiance because of a physical or developmental disability or mental impairment?
fields.description: If "Yes," skip Item Numbers 34.-37. and see the Legal Guardian, Surrogate, or Designated Representative section of the Instructions.

fields.name: understandsOathOfAllegiance
fields.label: Do you understand the full Oath of Allegiance to the United States (see Part 16. Oath of Allegiance)?

fields.name: willingToTakeOathOfAllegiance
fields.label: Are you willing to take the full Oath of Allegiance to the United States?

fields.name: willingToPerformNoncombatantService
fields.label: If the law requires it, are you willing to perform noncombatant services in the U.S. armed forces?

fields.name: willingToPerformWorkOfNationalImportance
fields.label: If the law requires it, are you willing to perform work of national importance under civilian direction?

fields.name: householdIncomeAtOrBelow400PctFPG
fields.label: My household income is less than or equal to 400% of the Federal Poverty Guidelines
fields.description: If false, skip to Part 11 (not requesting a reduced fee). If true, complete the remaining Part 10 fields.

fields.name: totalHouseholdIncome
fields.label: Total household income
fields.description: Required when requesting a reduced fee.

fields.name: householdSize
fields.label: My household size
fields.description: Required when requesting a reduced fee.

fields.name: totalHouseholdMembersEarningIncome
fields.label: Total number of household members earning income, including yourself
fields.description: Required when requesting a reduced fee.

fields.name: isHeadOfHousehold
fields.label: I am the head of household
fields.description: Required when requesting a reduced fee.

fields.name: nameOfHeadOfHousehold
fields.label: Name of head of household (if you selected "No" in Item Number 5.a.)
fields.description: Required when isHeadOfHousehold is false.

fields.name: usedInterpreter
fields.label: Was an interpreter used to prepare this application?
fields.description: Inferred from the Part 11 certification paragraph's reference to an interpreter listed in Part 12, rather than a distinct numbered checkbox. If true, complete Part 12.

fields.name: usedPreparer
fields.label: Was this application prepared by someone other than the applicant?
fields.description: Inferred from the existence of Part 13, "...if Other Than the Applicant," rather than a distinct numbered checkbox. If true, complete Part 13.

fields.name: applicantDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's Daytime Telephone Number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantEmail
fields.label: Applicant's Email Address (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: applicantSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Applicant's Signature
fields.description: By signing, the applicant certifies under penalty of perjury that all responses and information are complete, true, and correct.

fields.name: interpreterFamilyName
fields.label: Interpreter's Family Name (Last Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedInterpreter is true.

fields.name: interpreterGivenName
fields.label: Interpreter's Given Name (First Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedInterpreter is true.

fields.name: interpreterBusinessOrOrganizationName
fields.label: Interpreter's Business or Organization Name
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: interpreterLanguage
fields.label: Language in which the interpreter is fluent and interpreted for the applicant
fields.description: Required when usedInterpreter is true.
fields.sourceRef: Part 12 certification ("I am fluent in English and ___")

fields.name: interpreterDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Interpreter's Daytime Telephone Number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedInterpreter is true. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: interpreterMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Interpreter's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: interpreterEmail
fields.label: Interpreter's Email Address (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: interpreterSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Interpreter's Signature
fields.description: Required when usedInterpreter is true.

fields.name: preparerFamilyName
fields.label: Preparer's Family Name (Last Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedPreparer is true.

fields.name: preparerGivenName
fields.label: Preparer's Given Name (First Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedPreparer is true.

fields.name: preparerBusinessOrOrganizationName
fields.label: Preparer's Business or Organization Name
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: preparerDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Preparer's Daytime Telephone Number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when usedPreparer is true. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: preparerMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Preparer's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: preparerEmail
fields.label: Preparer's Email Address (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: preparerSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Preparer's Signature
fields.description: Required when usedPreparer is true.
